---
title: "Wasserstein Distance as a Loss Function for Image Morphing"
date: 2026-04-14
categories: [COT]
---

{{< include README.qmd >}}

---

- [Project Notebook (Code)](https://github.com/shreeshb51/shreeshb51.github.io/blob/main/projects/Wasserstein%20Distance%20as%20a%20Loss%20Function%20for%20Image%20Morphing/project_1_wasserstein_distance_for_morphing.ipynb)
- [Mathematical Framework](mathematical_framework.md)
- [Solving an Anchor Example](solving_anchor_example.md)

---
